ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crop_data" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each crop record */,
  "estimated_insects_count" INTEGER /* Estimated count of insects affecting the crop */,
  "crop_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of crop (e.g., corn, soybeans) */,
  "soil_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of soil (e.g., sandy, clay) */,
  "pesticide_use_category_id" INTEGER /* Category of pesticide use (e.g., none, low, moderate, high) */,
  "number_doses_week" INTEGER /* Number of doses administered per week */,
  "number_weeks_used" INTEGER /* Number of weeks the pesticide was used */,
  "number_weeks_quit" INTEGER /* Number of weeks the pesticide usage was stopped */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Growing season during which the crop was cultivated */,
  "crop_damage" INTEGER /* Incidence of crop damage (0 = no damage, 1 = damage occurred) */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Farm table */,
  "crop_cycle_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Crop Cycle table */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_data_crop_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_cycle_id") REFERENCES crop_cycles ("crop_cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_data_pesticide_use_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("pesticide_use_category_id") REFERENCES pesticide_use_categories ("pesticide_use_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_data_crop_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_type_id") REFERENCES crop_types ("crop_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_data_soil_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("soil_type_id") REFERENCES soil_types ("soil_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_data_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_types" (
  "crop_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop type */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop (e.g., corn, soybeans) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_types" (
  "soil_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil type */,
  "soil_name" TEXT /* Name of the soil type (e.g., sandy, clay) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the soil type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pesticide_use_categories" (
  "pesticide_use_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pesticide use category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the pesticide use category (e.g., none, low, moderate, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pesticide use category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pesticide_use_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the farm */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_cycles" (
  "crop_cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop cycle */,
  "crop_cycle_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop cycle */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the crop cycle */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the crop cycle */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pesticide_application_records" (
  "pesticide_application_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pesticide application record */,
  "crop_data_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the Crop Data table */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of pesticide application */,
  "dose" REAL /* Dose of pesticide applied */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pesticide_application_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pesticide_application_records_crop_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_data_id") REFERENCES crop_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, agronomist, farm worker) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
